mapper.insert: INSERT INTO groupactivity (activityName, description, budget, actualAmount, creatorID, createTime, settlementTime, isSettable, confirmInitiated, confirmDeadline, maxMember) VALUES (#{activityName}, #{description}, #{budget}, #{actualAmount}, #{creatorID}, #{createTime}, #{settlementTime}, #{isSettable}, #{confirmInitiated}, #{confirmDeadline}, #{maxMember})
mapper.update: UPDATE groupactivity SET activityName = #{activityName}, description = #{description}, budget = #{budget}, actualAmount = #{actualAmount}, confirmDeadline = #{confirmDeadline}, maxMember = #{maxMember} WHERE activityID = #{activityID}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM groupactivity WHERE activityID = #{activityID} AND isSettable = 0
mapper.select: SELECT ga.*, u.userName AS creatorName FROM groupactivity ga LEFT JOIN user u ON ga.creatorID = u.userID WHERE ga.activityID = #{activityID}
SELECT ga.*, u.userName AS creatorName FROM groupactivity ga LEFT JOIN user u ON ga.creatorID = u.userID ORDER BY ga.createTime DESC

SELECT ga.*, u.userName AS creatorName FROM groupactivity ga LEFT JOIN user u ON ga.creatorID = u.userID WHERE 1 = 1
AND (ga.activityName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ga.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(ga.activityID AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND ga.isSettable = #{isSettable}
ORDER BY ga.createTime DESC

SELECT ga.*, u.userName AS creatorName, am.confirmAttendStatus AS currentUserConfirmStatus FROM groupactivity ga INNER JOIN activitymember am ON ga.activityID = am.activityID AND am.memberID = #{userID} LEFT JOIN user u ON ga.creatorID = u.userID WHERE 1 = 1
AND (ga.activityName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ga.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(ga.activityID AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND ga.isSettable = #{isSettable}
ORDER BY ga.createTime DESC
SELECT ga.*, u.userName AS creatorName FROM groupactivity ga LEFT JOIN user u ON ga.creatorID = u.userID WHERE ga.creatorID = #{creatorID} ORDER BY ga.createTime DESC

SELECT ga.*, u.userName AS creatorName, am.confirmAttendStatus AS currentUserConfirmStatus FROM groupactivity ga INNER JOIN activitymember am ON ga.activityID = am.activityID LEFT JOIN user u ON ga.creatorID = u.userID WHERE am.memberID = #{memberID} ORDER BY ga.createTime DESC
